_comment: Provenance registry. The git history of this file is the database change log (release-workflow standard §5c). Chunk 1 of the input-data-engine migration: the 6 verified SARF-reference inputs the transport paper's loader served, content-addressed and staged in a LocalBackend store. These are the standardized, self-documenting versions (CF attrs, honest variable names, trimmed to used variables) — data-bit-identical to the originals. Chunk 2 adds the TEM, tropopause and optical-table datasets.

monthly_zonal_variables.description: Zonal-mean monthly climatology (2008-2017) of ERA5 air temperature and specific humidity on pressure levels; seeds the ERA5 reference state of the transport-paper model.

versions.source: ERA5 reanalysis monthly means on pressure levels (Copernicus CDS, reanalysis-era5-pressure-levels-monthly-means)
versions.processing: zonal mean over longitude; 12-month climatology averaged over 2008-2017

monthly_zonal_cloud_cover.description: Zonal-mean monthly climatology (2009-2018) of ERA5 fraction-of-cloud-cover on pressure levels.

versions.source: ERA5 zonal-mean cloud cover, derived from a GRIB-sourced historic monthly dataset
versions.processing: zonal mean over longitude; 12-month climatology over 2009-2018

monthly_zonal_cloud_content.description: Zonal-mean monthly climatology (2008-2017) of ERA5 specific cloud ice and liquid water content on pressure levels.

versions.source: ERA5 reanalysis monthly means on pressure levels (Copernicus CDS)

monthly_zonal_o3.description: Zonal-mean monthly ERA5 ozone mass mixing ratio on pressure levels; the 12 monthly means of the single year 2008.

versions.source: ERA5 reanalysis monthly means on pressure levels (Copernicus CDS)
versions.processing: zonal mean; the 12 monthly means of the single year 2008 (NOT a multi-year climatology)

monthly_zonal_srf_params.description: Zonal-mean monthly ERA5 surface temperature and humidity parameters; full monthly series 2008-2017 (120 months).

versions.source: ERA5 reanalysis monthly means on single levels (Copernicus CDS)
versions.processing: zonal mean; full monthly series 2008-2017 (120 months, not a climatology); ts/q2m/qs derived per generate_era5_monthly_zonal_srf_params.py

monthly_zonal_surface_sw_balance.description: Zonal-mean monthly ERA5 surface downward and net short-wave radiation fluxes (year 2008); used to derive the surface albedo of the transport-paper model.

versions.source: ERA5 reanalysis monthly means on single levels (Copernicus CDS)
versions.processing: zonal mean over longitude; 12 monthly means of the single year 2008; surface downward and net SW fluxes (used to derive surface albedo = (down - net) / down)
versions.notes: provided ERA5 single-level download; no generator script; surface SW fields only (albedo)

eddy_diffusivity.description: Raw (un-postprocessed) ERA5 model-level eddy-diffusivity tensor with std and std/|mean| ratios, plus the Pitari Transformed-Eulerian-Mean (TEM) residual-circulation decomposition of the eddy transport stream function (velocities and stream functions). Monthly fields, 2008-2017.

versions.source: ERA5 model levels (L137), ARCO-ERA5 GCS Zarr
versions.processing: Pitari TEM decomposition of eddy transport stream function; displacement-tracking K-tensor; RAW (no tensor postprocessing); monthly fields concatenated over 2008-2017
versions.notes: raw (un-postprocessed) model-level eddy-diffusivity tensor + TEM residual circulation; no floor replacement, eigenvalue constraint or negative masking; std and std/|mean| ratios included; downstream code chooses any cutoff criteria

tropopause.description: ERA5 zonal-mean monthly tropopause pressure (2008-2017), per year and month, on a 1-degree latitude grid; per-latitude max of dynamical and WMO-1st thermal tropopause pressures. Variable: tropopause_pressure.

versions.source: Hoffmann & Spang Reanalysis Tropopause Data Repository (DOI 10.26165/JUELICH-DATA/UBNGI2), era5low zonal-mean subset
versions.processing: per-latitude max of dynamical and WMO-1st tropopause pressures, by year and month

optical_silica.description: RRTMG-banded Mie optical-property table for silica; generated by the optical generator (uniform coszen grid, nr=51).

versions.source: Refractive-index input: Kitamura, Pilon & Jonasz, 'Optical constants of silica glass from extreme ultraviolet to far infrared at near room temperature', Applied Optics 46(33), 8118-8133 (2007), doi:10.1364/AO.46.008118. Used as the multi-oscillator Lorentzian model (Table 2 parameters) plus the sampled n/k measurements carried in optical/data/silica/ for wavelengths below 8 um.
versions.processing: Stage 1: Kitamura multi-oscillator refractive-index model with Kramers-Kronig-consistent real part, replaced below 8 um by sampled n/k measurements. Stage 2: Mie efficiencies (miepython) Planck-weighted into the RRTMG shortwave/longwave band tables.
versions.notes: new-code-generated table; the generator reproduces it bit-for-bit (validated); reproduces the published table to float precision at matched scattering angles

optical_sulfate.description: RRTMG-banded Mie optical-property table for sulfate (75% H2SO4); generated by the optical generator (uniform coszen grid, nr=51).

versions.source: Refractive-index input: 75% H2SO4 complex index stitched from three published sources. (1) Hummel, Shettle & Longtin, 'A New Background Stratospheric Aerosol Model for Use in Atmospheric Radiation Models', AFGL-TR-88-0166 (1988) -- broadband background table. (2) Ferraro, Charlton-Perez & Highwood, 'Stratospheric dynamics and midlatitude jets under geoengineering with space mirrors and sulfate and titania aerosols', Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres 120(2), 414-429 (2015), doi:10.1002/2014JD022734 -- 75% sulphuric-acid index (SRA data). (3) Gosse, Labrie & Chylek, 'Refractive index of dry and aqueous sulphuric acid: imaginary part of the refractive index of sulfates and nitrates in the 0.7-2.6 um spectral region', Applied Optics 36(16), 3622-3628 (1997) -- absorption (imaginary index) measurements. Raw input files carried in optical/data/sulfate/.
versions.processing: Stage 1: broadband background refractive-index table overlaid, where available, by the Ferraro (2015) and Gosse (1997) measurements. Stage 2: Mie efficiencies (miepython) Planck-weighted into the RRTMG shortwave/longwave band tables.
versions.notes: new-code-generated table; the generator reproduces it bit-for-bit (validated); reproduces the published table to float precision at matched scattering angles

optical_calcite.description: RRTMG-banded Mie optical-property table for calcite; generated by the optical generator (uniform coszen grid, nr=51).

versions.source: Refractive-index input: Long, Querry, Bell & Alexander, 'Optical properties of calcite and gypsum in crystalline and powdered form in the infrared and far-infrared', Infrared Physics 34(2), 191-201 (1993), doi:10.1016/0020-0891(93)90008-U. Used as the calcite ordinary-ray and extraordinary-ray Lorentz-oscillator parameters (Tables 1 and 2); no raw data files (analytic oscillator model).
versions.processing: Stage 1: Lorentz multi-oscillator dielectric model, averaged over the ordinary and extraordinary rays. Stage 2: Mie efficiencies (miepython) Planck-weighted into the RRTMG shortwave/longwave band tables.
versions.notes: new-code-generated table; the generator reproduces it bit-for-bit (validated); reproduces the published table to float precision at matched scattering angles
